Document:
# Surgery Surgery is surgery.
Here is a list of operations and how they can be done, and on what:
## Operations
### Body - Re-adding any limb: use the limb on the body
- Opening an incision: use a slicing or cutting tool, slicing is generally preferable - Cauterising an incision: use a welding or cauterising tool while the incision is opened and ribcage is closed
- Cutting head/ears/eyes off: while the incision is opened and ribcage is closed, select the operation and examine the patient to see steps
- Opening the ribcage: after opening an incision, select the operation and use a saw - Closing the ribcage: use a cauterising tool
- Re-adding the heart/lungs: while the ribcage is open, use the organ on the body - Cutting the heart/lungs out: while the ribcage is open, select the operation and examine the patient to see steps
### Individual limbs - Opening an incision: same as for the body - Cauterising an incision: same as for the body
- Cutting hands/feet off: use a saw on the limb - Re-adding hands/feet: while the incision is opened, use the body-part on the limb to reattach it
